summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Pelangi Homestay Guest AI. All 23 backend pytest tests pass including AI chat (info, menu, guardrail refusal, booking-via-tool). All frontend flows (login, dashboard stats, chat simulator, KB/Rooms/Menu/Bookings/Service Requests/Prompt/Analytics/Settings/Conversations, logout) verified via Playwright with no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_service.py has an unused run_ai_turn() function that appears to be dead code — can be removed to reduce confusion.

server.py DELETE /api/knowledge-base/{id}, /api/rooms/{id}, /api/menu/{id} do not check matched_count — they return {ok:true} even if the id does not exist. Consider returning 404 for missing resources for consistency with PUT.

chat_message endpoint requires an authenticated admin token (get_current_user). This is fine for admin simulator but implies the /api/chat/message path cannot be reused as-is for real guest-facing WhatsApp integration; a public/service-token variant may be needed later.

seed.py — email uniqueness relies on the count==0 short-circuit. If the users collection has any doc but not the admin/superadmin, seed will not create them. Consider upserting by email so seed is idempotent for the two default accounts.
_compute_room_price falls back silently to 0.0 if room_type is unknown — booking creation will succeed with 0 total. Consider raising a 400 with a helpful message.

AppLayout uses tid abstraction for nav — good. However, individual page-level data-testid presence is inconsistent (Analytics.jsx has 0 testids). Fine for now since Recharts renders detectable SVGs, but adding testids on Analytics KPIs would help future automation.
No rate limiting or size limit on /api/chat/message body — abusive clients could spam LLM calls.
test_credentials: admin@pelangi.id / Admin123! (role admin), superadmin@pelangi.id / Super123! (role super_admin)
seed_data_creation: No manual seeding needed. Backend seed_all() runs on startup and populates users, KB (12 items), rooms (3), menu (8 with Jus Alpukat sold out), default prompt v1, and settings singleton. Tests also generated: 1 AI booking for +62811222333 (Andi, Deluxe 25-26 Aug 2026), 1 manual booking for TEST_Guest (+62811999888), 1 service request TEST_SR (extra_towel), and several TEST_ conversations. Prompt versions may have been bumped and restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, KB CRUD, Rooms CRUD, Menu, Availability, Bookings, Service Requests, Prompt Management, Settings, Analytics, Chat (info, menu, guardrail, booking-tool), Conversations + handover. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. AI chat tests take ~5-15s each (LLM calls). All frontend nav-* data-testids present in AppLayout. Chat messages appear as data-testid=chat-msg-* bubbles. Room cards use data-testid=room-card-*, menu rows menu-row-*, conversation items conv-item-*.
